creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
To minimize the impact of the ports tree
the patch included the split of sendmail and libmilter.
The patch was tested with the migration.

Due to the lack of interest for 3 weeks,
the split of sendmail and libmilter was done without USES=milter.

The patch do no longer apply and is obsolete.

In my opinion there was enough time wasted on this issue.
